title: Luke's Vanilla Plus
description: Aiming to make playing with friends a lot more fun, this pack provides subtle improvements to many base vanilla features. For 1.20.1
body:
# Luke's Vanilla Plus


## Overview
A modpack designed to provide a subtle improvement to a wide variety of the vanilla games base features, and suited best to be enjoyed among friends.

## Features

- **World** - With improved terrain generation and view distances, exploration has never felt quite so great.
- **Exploration** - Discover new structures and uncover 12 hidden eyes to reach The End.
- **Combat** - Get into the moment with a easy and intuitive combat revamp.
- **Settle** - Make your home your own with new furniature and machinery.
- **Qol** - Many qulity of life features to smooth out gameplay.

## Multiplayer
This modpack boasts some great multiplayer features.
- **Easy Lan Worlds** The Essential Mod makes inviting your friends to your world only a few clicks away.
- **Voice Chat** The in depth voice chat system makes talking to your friends so much easier. And it interacts with your world too!
